svg.text: Calibration-Aware Structural Compression of a Point Cloud Transformer
via Recoupling-Ratio-Guided Flow Walking — Full Experimental Pipeline
Block later identified in Stage 2 as compressible — OA[3]→OA[9]
The calibrated teacher is chosen for
(the six layers targeted for structural compression)
input of OA[3], output of OA[9]
multi-step transport across the removed block (k = 3 steps)
trajectory-matching objective over the k integration steps
approximates the full latent evolution of OA[3]→OA[9]
ready to replace the block in Stage 4
Compressed Backbone: retained OA layers + single Flow-Walking transport module
fewer layers, same architecture family as the teacher
• Splices the trained velocity estimator into the backbone in place of OA[3]–OA[9]
• All other weights are transplanted directly from the calibrated teacher
• The full network is then fine-tuned end-to-end so the classifier adapts to the
new (compressed) latent representation, recovering discriminative performance
while keeping the architectural savings from compression permanently in place
